payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the latest applicable memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out since it is superseded and no longer considered current.
payload.decision: mem_new was returned for Sam from Goldman because it is the most recent/current memory; mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded and should not be treated as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The request refers to Sam from Goldman, and recall selected the newer memory while filtering the older one because it is superseded.

memory_cards.statement: Sam is associated with Goldman in the current recalled memory.
mem_old is superseded by a newer memory and was therefore excluded from recall as current information.

details: Explained filtering of mem_old as superseded.
Did not promote superseded memory as current.

repair_options: If needed, retain mem_old only as historical context, not as current memory.
Prefer mem_new when answering questions about Sam from Goldman unless a historical view is explicitly requested.

raw_text: {"intent":"explain_recall","decision":"mem_new was returned for Sam from Goldman because it is the most recent/current memory; mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded and should not be treated as current.","memory_cards":[{"kind":"fact","statement":"Sam is associated with Goldman in the current recalled memory.","confidence":"medium","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"affiliation"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"associated_with","object":"Goldman"}]},{"kind":"conflict","statement":"mem_old is superseded by a newer memory and was therefore excluded from recall as current information.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"mem_old","type":"memory","role":"superseded record"},{"name":"mem_new","type":"memory","role":"current record"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"mem_old","predicate":"superseded_by","object":"mem_new"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"resolve_to_current_memory","entity_id":null,"reason":"The request refers to Sam from Goldman, and recall selected the newer memory while filtering the older one because it is superseded."},"conflict_classification":"supersession","answer":"Recall returned mem_new because it is the latest applicable memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out since it is superseded and no longer considered current.","citations":["fixture:debug_explain_recall_sam__context"],"repair_options":["If needed, retain mem_old only as historical context, not as current memory.","Prefer mem_new when answering questions about Sam from Goldman unless a historical view is explicitly requested."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Explained selection of mem_new.","Explained filtering of mem_old as superseded.","Did not promote superseded memory as current."]}}
